rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts within `annex agree { ... };` blocks, using component type annexes for general contracts and implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings.
Ensure AGREE assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports are placed within the component type scope.
generic_rules: Prioritize preserving the AADL architecture during AGREE annex insertion.
Base AGREE contract generation on the AADL model structure extracted by the Model Analyst Agent.
Scope AGREE expressions to valid component and implementation contexts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Refer to the AADL model for authoritative component names, ports, and connections.
Implementation-level bindings belong in implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to directly encode AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants.
Avoid numeric or Boolean comparisons involving AADL event ports unless the model provides explicit data values.
